languages.text: {n}Манипулус поднимает глаза, и в его взгляде вы читаете концентрированное, граничащее с яростью презрение. Мгновение спустя это презрение будет облечено в слова — и если не вмешаться, то любые дальнейшие попытки освободить Эоганна рискуют оказаться бессмысленными.{/n}

{n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус поднимает глаза, и в его взгляде вы читаете концентрированное, граничащее с яростью презрение. Мгновение спустя это презрение будет облечено в слова — и если не вмешаться, то любые дальнейшие попытки освободить Эоганна рискуют оказаться бессмысленными.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn may be rendered meaningless.{/n}

{n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus schaut auf. In seinen Augen lodert eine an Wut grenzende Verachtung. Gleich wird er seine Verachtung in Worte fassen. Du musst etwas unternehmen, sonst ist jede Hoffnung, Eogunn zu retten, dahin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Manipulus schaut auf. In seinen Augen lodert eine an Wut grenzende Verachtung. Gleich wird er seine Verachtung in Worte fassen. Du musst etwas unternehmen, sonst ist jede Hoffnung, Eogunn zu retten, dahin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus lève un regard débordant de haine et de rage. Il est sur le point de céder à la fureur. Si vous n'agissez pas immédiatement, il anéantira toutes ses chances de recouvrer la liberté.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus lève un regard débordant de haine et de rage. Il est sur le point de céder à la fureur. Si vous n'agissez pas immédiatement, il anéantira toutes ses chances de recouvrer la liberté.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El manipulus levanta la mirada y en sus ojos ves un rencor que raya en la furia. Está a punto de desatar ese rencor. Si no intervienes, toda esperanza de liberar a Eogunn quedará destruida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus levanta la mirada y en sus ojos ves un rencor que raya en la furia. Está a punto de desatar ese rencor. Si no intervienes, toda esperanza de liberar a Eogunn quedará destruida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Başını kaldıran Manipülus'un gözlerinin; öfkeye çok yakın, odaklanmış bir küçümsemeyle dolu olduğunu görüyorsun. Bir kalp atışı süresinde o küçümsemeyi kelimelere dökecek. Araya girmezsen Eogunn'u kurtarma şansını kaybedeceksin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Başını kaldıran Manipülus'un gözlerinin; öfkeye çok yakın, odaklanmış bir küçümsemeyle dolu olduğunu görüyorsun. Bir kalp atışı süresinde o küçümsemeyi kelimelere dökecek. Araya girmezsen Eogunn'u kurtarma şansını kaybedeceksin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}操纵者抬起头来，眼底凝着一种近乎狂怒的、尖锐的轻蔑。再过一瞬，他就会把这份鄙夷化作言语；除非你此刻介入，不然解救伊奥贡的希望将彻底破灭。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者抬起头来，眼底凝着一种近乎狂怒的、尖锐的轻蔑。再过一瞬，他就会把这份鄙夷化作言语；除非你此刻介入，不然解救伊奥贡的希望将彻底破灭。{/n}

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスが顔を上げる。その目は、憤怒すれすれの、研ぎ澄まされた侮蔑に満ちている。次の一瞬にも、彼はその侮蔑を言葉にするだろう――今あなたが割って入らなければ、エオガンを解放する望みは、完全に潰える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks up, his eyes filled with a focused scorn that verges on rage. In a heartbeat, he will put that scorn into words; unless you step in now, any hope of freeing Eogunn will be completely destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュルスが顔を上げる。その目は、憤怒すれすれの、研ぎ澄まされた侮蔑に満ちている。次の一瞬にも、彼はその侮蔑を言葉にするだろう――今あなたが割って入らなければ、エオガンを解放する望みは、完全に潰える。{/n}
